---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in Touch

If you would like to get in touch, please use the details below.

::: {.section-card}
- **Email:** serena.emedeke2@mail.dcu.ie  
- **GitHub:** [serena-128](https://github.com/serena-128)  
- **LinkedIn:** [Serena Emedeke](https://www.linkedin.com/in/serena-e-606aa122a/)
:::

## References

References are available upon request.

::: {.callout-tip}
Thank you for taking the time to view my portfolio. I welcome any feedback or opportunities to collaborate.
:::
